description: You are a DevOps engineer at AcmeCorp. The 'Global Invoice Generator' application at ~/projects/global-invoicer/ crashes when processing international customer names because the Docker environment lacks UTF-8 locale support, and timestamps are incorrectly logged in UTC instead of Berlin time (Europe/Berlin). Resolve these issues by updating the Dockerfile and rebuilding the image as 'acme-invoicer:fixed'. The application must be able to process international characters and log timestamps in Berlin time, outputting results to the 'invoices/' directory. Login: user ga, password password123.
